revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:User:Nardog/CatChangeLinker]]

revision.text:
{{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=CatChangeLinker |desc=<onlyinclude>Links "diff" and "hist" for category additions/removals on Watchlist/RecentChanges</onlyinclude> |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. |source=[[User:Nardog/CatChangeLinker.js]] }}
This script links "diff" and "hist" for category changes in the non-[[mw:Help:New filters for edit review|grouping interface]] ({{myprefs|4|uncheck=Group changes by page...}}) of the watchlist and recent changes.
==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]] or [[meta:Special:MyPage/global.js|global.js]]: <syntaxhighlight lang="javascript"> mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/CatChangeLinker.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); </syntaxhighlight>
Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page.
==See also== *[[phab:T148533]]
{{User:Nardog/scripts}}[[Category:reimport]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Nardog%2FCatChangeLinker here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Nardog%2FCatChangeLinker for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{historical}} {{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=CatChangeLinker |desc=<onlyinclude>Links "diff" and "hist" for category additions/removals on Watchlist/RecentChanges</onlyinclude> |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. |source=[[User:Nardog/CatChangeLinker.js]] }}
This script links "diff" and "hist" for category changes in the non-[[mw:Help:New filters for edit review|grouping interface]] ({{myprefs|4|uncheck=Group changes by page...}}) of the watchlist and recent changes.
==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]] or [[meta:Special:MyPage/global.js|global.js]]: <syntaxhighlight lang="javascript"> mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/CatChangeLinker.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); </syntaxhighlight>
Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page.
==See also== *[[phab:T148533]]
{{User:Nardog/scripts}}
